name: poppy-memory
description: Developer memory CLI. Remember what matters across sessions.
long_description: Poppy is a local developer memory store. Agents call remember/recall via MCP to retrieve non-obvious decisions, preferences, and lessons across coding sessions. Storage lives at ~/.poppy/. The first run downloads ~160MB of sentence-transformer weights for hybrid retrieval.

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Store a memory (decision, preference, fact, lesson, summary).

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Search and return memories with full content.

tools.name: recall_index
tools.description: Cheap two-stage recall: returns id + snippet only.

tools.name: recall_full
tools.description: Fetch full memory bodies for a list of ids.

tools.name: edit
tools.description: Modify an existing memory's content or metadata.

tools.name: consolidate
tools.description: Persist a session summary plus extracted facts.

tools.name: context
tools.description: List recent memories scoped to a project.

poppy_dir.title: Storage directory
poppy_dir.description: Where Poppy keeps its SQLite database and embedding cache.
